name: Creamy Green Beans Almondine
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (9 oz.) frozen green beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, melt the margarine.
2. Stir in the flour and bouillon granules.
3. Gradually stir in the milk; cook and stir until thickened.
4. Add the cheese and stir until melted.
5. Add the green beans; heat through.
6. Stir in the toasted almonds.
7. Serve immediately. Refrigerate leftovers.
Makes 6 servings.
